path.description: Directory to digest. LOCAL (no --cluster): a path relative to --experiment-dir, or an absolute path that resolves WITHIN it. REMOTE (--cluster set): an absolute cluster path that must resolve strictly under the cluster's scratch root (the same confinement inspect-deployment uses).
path.title: Path

newest.description: How many newest-by-mtime entries to include (default 10). 0 omits the list; the counts/size/histogram still compute.
newest.title: Newest

marker_scan.description: When true (default), scan *.log/*.err files for the engine's known failure markers and report per-marker line-hit counts (bounded per-file). False skips the scan entirely.
marker_scan.title: Marker Scan

cluster.description: Cluster key from clusters.yaml to digest a REMOTE tree over one throttled ssh read. Omit for a LOCAL digest (the first-class path).
cluster.title: Cluster
